content.en:
Time passes slowly.

In a short period of time, there have been successive extermination of the strength of the Eternal Ruler or the Eternal Controller, some of which may not have anything to do with the Black Ancestor, but most of them have something to do with the Black Ancestor.

As a result, everyone in the Origin Realm Sea is in danger.

All of a sudden, the Origin Realm Sea fell into chaos.

On this day, many of the Ten Realm-level controllers of the Origin Realm Sea gathered together to discuss the matter of the Black Ancestor.

Fengxue City.

One by one, the Ten Realm-level masters came here and used this place as a meeting place.

Ye Tian, the Black Decay Controller, the Ancient Demon Controller, the Snow Girl Controller, the Primordial Controller, and other Ten Realm-level controllers all came here.

At this time, the primordial controller spoke: "Everyone, the Black Ancestor is out of trouble, everyone should know it. Black Ancestor practiced the Heaven Snatching Technique, so with his temperament, he was afraid that he would devour a large number of Eternal Controllers. "

"Yes, Black Ancestor can't be allowed to continue like this!" the Black Decay Controller also followed.

At this time, a Ten Realm-level controller said: "Primordial Controller, Black Decay Controller, are you sure to deal with Black Ancestor?" Black Ancestor's strength has almost reached the extreme of the Ten Realm-level controllers, he was very arrogant at the beginning, and even the great beings were a little ignorant, although he was easily sealed by the Primordial Ancestor in the end, but that was the Primordial Ancestor was powerful, and we couldn't help him!"

"I can't beat the Black Ancestor!" the original master admitted.

"I'm not weaker than the Black Ancestor, but if anyone is stronger, then we have to fight to know!" said the Black Decay Master.

Ye Tian spoke: "No matter what the strength of the Black Ancestor is, this matter must be stopped, otherwise, with the character of the Black Ancestor, once the eternal controller of the entire Origin Realm Sea is slaughtered, it will not be impossible." When the time comes, you may not be able to live. "

Many Ten Realm-level masters frowned, this was also something they were worried about now.

At present, apart from attacking the Dreadnought Ancestor, the Black Ancestor has not made a move against other Ten Realm-level controllers.

They all knew that the Black Ancestor had a holiday with the Fearless Ancestor, so it was normal for them to make a move.

But now, they are watching the show, and they don't have to worry about their own safety, and Heizu is also afraid of a chain reaction, so he doesn't dare to attack other Ten Realm-level controllers in a short time.

However, what about in the future?

So, a lot of things have to be thought about first.

"So what now?" said a Ten Realm-level master.

Immediately, they began to discuss, and one by one they expressed their opinions, and then they were rejected one by one.

Someone proposed to shoot all of them and besiege Heizu.

But once they fail, under the crazy revenge of the Black Ancestor, unless they stay together all the time, they will be attacked one by one, and then it will be over.

Many Ten Realm-level masters didn't want to die either, so they didn't dare to do so, after all, once they failed, they might be the ones who died.

So, they have to be cautious.

After discussing it for a long time, the Black Immortal Controller said, "In this way, I'll test the Black Ancestor first, and persuade the Black Ancestor to stop, otherwise I will be the enemy of all the Eternal Masters, and see how he reacts." If necessary, play him up and see what he's capable of. "

"I think so!"

"This method is feasible, let's try it first. "

"There is no other way, the great beings can't enter the Origin Realm Sea, that's the only way!"

They didn't need to face the Black Ancestor directly, so they all agreed.

Subsequently.

The meeting dispersed, and one by one the other Eternal Masters departed.

Then.

Ye Tian and the Black Immortal Controller said, "Senior Brother Black Decay, do you really want to go and meet the Black Ancestor for a while?"

"Yes, I'd love to fight Heizu for a moment or two, and this is an opportunity. The Black Decay Controller said excitedly.

Ye Tian also knew that the Black Decay Controller liked to fight, and the object he wanted to fight the most was the Black Ancestor.

At the beginning, when the Black Ancestor had not yet been sealed, the Black Decay Controller had not yet grown to the current level, and naturally he was far from being the opponent of the Black Ancestor, so he had never fought against the Black Ancestor.

Strictly speaking, the two do not belong to the same era, but they are often compared by the eternal masters of later generations.

"Then Senior Brother Black Decay be careful, I am also secretly observing, if anything happens, I will also take action. "

Ye Tian said.

"Little junior brother, then arrange it like this, but you don't have to worry about me!" said the Black Decay Master.

Subsequently.

The Black Decay Controller went to find the Black Ancestor.

Hei Zu is easy to find, he didn't deliberately hide, he is currently in the White Immortal Mountain of the White Immortal Controller.

......

Outside the White Styx Mountain.

The Black Decay Controller came here and shouted directly: "Black Ancestor, come out!"

"It's the Black Rotten Master!"

The White Immortal Master's face changed.

The Black Decay Controller is also very famous in this era now, no less than the original Black Ancestor.

Rumble!

Black Ancestor didn't hesitate at all, and stepped out of the White Immortal Mountain in one step, his eyes confronting the Black Decay Controller.

"Black Decay Master, I didn't expect that the little guy at the beginning has grown up now!" Black Ancestor sneered.

The Black Decay Controller said directly: "Black Ancestor, you have killed too many Eternal Masters recently, and it has caused the dissatisfaction of all Eternal Controllers. Now I give you two paths, the first way is to make a natal vow not to practice the Heaven Capture Technique, after all, completely erase your Heaven Capture Technique. Second, it is to be the enemy of all the Eternal Masters, so let's fight, which path do you choose?"

"You threaten me?"

Heizu was furious.

"What if it's a threat?"

The Black Decay Controller said coldly.

"Hahaha, even if you dare to threaten me, I want to know what you are capable of?"

Heizu didn't say a word, and shot directly.

Moreover, he likes to use the Great Dark Nest that surpasses the top Origin Control Technique as soon as he makes a move.

Bang!!!!

The Great Nest of Darkness filled the entire area, even covering the White Styx Mountain.

"The Great Nest of Darkness!"

The Black Decay Controller naturally knew about this move, but he was not afraid at all.

Airplanes!

A spear was in his hand.

This is not an ordinary weapon, but a weapon of will.

"Since the condensation of the will weapon is against me, however, I also have the will weapon!"

The Black Ancestor's weapon of will is a black chain.

Once, the primordial ancestor smashed his will clone and sealed him again, after he got out of trouble, he did not condense the will clone, but condensed the will weapon, so that the single combat power was more powerful.

Thundered!!!

The Black Ancestor and the Black Decay Controller kept fighting, colliding again and again.

However, in the Great Lair of Darkness, the Black Rotten Masters are at a disadvantage, and thus at a disadvantage.

"Immortal Spear!"

The Black Rotten Ruler also performed a move comparable to that of the Great Nest of Darkness.

Tear !!!

The billions of space-time barriers that the Dark Nest had turned into were pierced one by one, and a spear shadow seemed to directly penetrate the Dark Nest, but it did not completely break through the Dark Nest.

And this blow also caused Heizu's chains to collapse, cracks appeared in his body, and he was knocked out.

Soon, however, his body healed.

"This move has some meaning, but it can't hurt me, I have practiced the dark origin body, the body is the dark origin, immortal and indestructible, you can't kill me, it's hard to hurt me, only the great beings can kill me!"

Hei Zu said arrogantly.
